description: Framework for web testing and automation.

option.name: --config
tip: Configuration file, or a test directory with optional "playwright.config.{m,c}?{js,ts}".

next.name: codegen
tip: Open page and generate code for user actions.

option.name: --browser
tip: Browser to use, one of cr, chromium, ff, firefox, wk, webkit.

option.name: --load-storage
tip: Load context storage state from the file, previously saved with --save-storage.

option.name: --output
tip: Saves the generated script to a file.

option.name: --proxy-bypass
tip: Comma-separated domains to bypass proxy, for example ".com,chromium.org,.domain.com".

option.name: --proxy-server
tip: Specify proxy server, for example "http://myproxy:3128" or "socks5://myproxy:8080".

option.name: --save-har
tip: Save HAR file with all network activity at the end.

option.name: --save-har-glob
tip: Filter entries in the HAR by matching url against this glob pattern.

option.name: --save-storage
tip: Save context storage state at the end, for later use with --load-storage.

option.name: --test-id-attribute
tip: Use the specified attribute to generate data test ID selectors.

option.name: --timeout
tip: Timeout for Playwright actions in milliseconds, no timeout by default.

option.name: --timezone
tip: Time zone to emulate, for example "Europe/Rome".

option.name: --user-data-dir
tip: Use the specified user data directory instead of a new context.

option.name: --viewport-size
tip: Specify browser viewport size in pixels, for example "1280, 720".

option.name: --config
tip: Configuration file to find a project to use for seed test.

option.name: --project
tip: Project to use for seed test.

option.name: --prompts
tip: Whether to include prompts in the agent initialization.

next.name: install
tip: Ensure browsers necessary for this version of Playwright are installed.

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Do not execute installation, only print information.

option.name: --force
tip: Force reinstall of already installed browsers.

option.name: --list
tip: Prints list of browsers from all playwright installations.

option.name: --no-progress
tip: Do not show download progress bars.

option.name: --no-shell
tip: Do not install chromium headless shell.

option.name: --only-shell
tip: Only install headless shell when installing chromium.

next.name: install-deps
tip: Install dependencies necessary to run browsers (will ask for sudo permissions).

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Do not modify the system. On Linux, simulate the install via apt-get and exit with a non-zero code if any required packages are missing; on Windows, print the install command.

next.name: merge-reports
tip: Merge multiple blob reports (for sharded tests) into a single report.

option.name: --config
tip: Configuration file. Can be used to specify additional configuration for the output report.

next.name: open
tip: Open page in browser specified via -b, --browser.

option.name: --wait-for-selector
tip: Wait for given selector before saving as pdf.

tip: Wait for given timeout in milliseconds before saving as pdf.

option.name: --browser
tip: Browser to use, one of cr, chromium, ff, firefox, wk, webkit.

option.name: --full-page
tip: Whether to take a full page screenshot (entire scrollable area).

option.name: --load-storage
tip: Load context storage state from the file, previously saved with --save-storage.

option.name: --timeout
tip: Timeout for Playwright actions in milliseconds, no timeout by default.

option.name: --timezone
tip: Time zone to emulate, for example "Europe/Rome".

option.name: --user-data-dir
tip: Use the specified user data directory instead of a new context.

option.name: --viewport-size
tip: Specify browser viewport size in pixels, for example "1280, 720".

option.name: --wait-for-selector
tip: Wait for selector before taking a screenshot.

option.name: --wait-for-timeout
tip: Wait for timeout in milliseconds before taking a screenshot.

option.name: --browser
tip: Browser to use, one of cr, chromium, ff, firefox, wk, webkit.

option.name: --host
tip: Host to serve trace on; specifying this option opens trace in a browser tab.

option.name: --port
tip: Port to serve trace on, 0 for any free port; specifying this option opens trace in a browser tab.

option.name: --stdin
tip: Accept trace URLs over stdin to update the viewer.

option.name: --config
tip: Configuration file, or a test directory with optional "playwright.config.{m,c}?{js,ts}".

option.name: --fail-on-flaky-tests
tip: Fail if any test is flagged as flaky.

option.name: --global-timeout
tip: Maximum time this test suite can run in milliseconds.

option.name: --grep
tip: Only run tests matching this regular expression.

option.name: --grep-invert
tip: Only run tests that do not match this regular expression.

option.name: --last-failed-file
tip: Override the default path for the last-run JSON file.

option.name: --list
tip: Collect all the tests and report them, but do not run.

option.name: --max-failures
tip: Stop after the first N failures.

option.name: --only-changed
tip: Only run test files that have been changed between 'HEAD' and 'ref'.

option.name: --pass-with-no-tests
tip: Makes test run succeed even if no tests were found.

option.name: --project
tip: Only run tests from the specified list of projects.

option.name: --retries
tip: Maximum retry count for flaky tests, zero for no retries.

option.name: --run-agents
tip: Run agents to generate the code for page.perform.

option.name: --shard
tip: Shard tests and execute only the selected shard, specify in the form "current/all", 1-based.

option.name: --test-list
tip: Path to a file containing a list of tests to run.

option.name: --test-list-invert
tip: Path to a file containing a list of tests to skip.

option.name: --timeout
tip: Specify test timeout threshold in milliseconds, zero for unlimited.

option.name: --tsconfig
tip: Path to a single tsconfig applicable to all imported files.

option.name: --ui
tip: Run tests in interactive UI mode.

option.name: --ui-port
tip: Port to serve UI on, 0 for any free port.

option.name: --update-source-method
tip: Chooses the way source is updated.

option.name: --workers
tip: Number of concurrent workers or percentage of logical CPU cores.

next.name: trace
tip: Inspect trace files from the command line.

next.name: action
tip: Show details of a specific action.

next.name: attachment
tip: Extract a trace attachment by its number.

next.name: request
tip: Show details of a specific network request.

next.name: screenshot
tip: Save screencast screenshot for an action.

next.name: snapshot
tip: Run a playwright-cli command against a DOM snapshot.

option.name: --name
tip: Snapshot phase: before, input, or after.

option.name: --serve
tip: Serve snapshot on localhost and keep running.

next.name: uninstall
tip: Removes browsers used by this installation of Playwright from the system (chromium, firefox, webkit, ffmpeg). This does not include branded channels.

option.name: --all
tip: Removes all browsers used by any Playwright installation from the system.
